name: chat-codex
description: Lightweight middleware between Codex and pluggable chat channels.
author: 小黄 and Codex

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/tests/unit/*.test.js dist/tests/integration/*.test.js
scripts.cli:mock: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js test
scripts.cli:terminal:mock: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js terminal mock
scripts.cli:terminal:codex: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js terminal codex
scripts.cli:weixin:status: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js weixin status
scripts.cli:weixin:login: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js weixin login
scripts.cli:feishu:status: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js feishu status
